overall.description: A static third-person view from a video game showing a character standing in a grand castle hall with gothic architecture, warm candlelight, and intricate marble floors. Other students in school uniforms periodically walk past the stationary camera, creating a lived-in atmosphere in the ornate interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand castle hall with central statue and candlelight

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, positioned in a grand gothic castle hall with warm candlelight illuminating the ornate marble floors and central statue. Students in dark uniforms periodically walk through the space, passing by the camera as they move between the archways, while the player character stands quietly observing near the left wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, observant perspective within a grand gothic castle hall where the atmosphere is defined by a quiet, lived-in stillness. It begins with a stationary view of the ornate marble floors and a central statue, all bathed in the soft glow of warm candlelight. As the scene unfolds, students in dark uniforms periodically drift through the space, their movement creating a rhythmic flow between the towering archways. The camera remains fixed, capturing the contrast between the bustling students and the player character who stands quietly observing from near the left wall.
